title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Amazon Private Seller Ltd
body: "Application number 5032  Applicant Amazon Technologies, Inc objected to the name used by Amazon Private Seller Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Amazon Private Seller Ltd is changed to 15196730, Ltd. "
